game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Evoland**: "Evoland" is an adventure RPG where players control a character whose world and mechanics dynamically evolve as they progress through a linear narrative. Initially, players navigate a monochrome 2D environment using a virtual D-pad for movement and tap to attack in simple encounters. The core mechanic involves opening specific "evolution chests" or reaching story milestones, which instantly unlock new gameplay features such as color graphics, screen scrolling, sound, a world map, and eventually full 3D environments and real-time combat. Combat evolves from basic tap-to-attack to a turn-based system with Active Time Battle (ATB) bars, and later to real-time action combat with virtual joystick movement and on-screen buttons for sword attacks, bow shots, and dodge rolls. Progression is entirely story-driven, with each evolution being a mandatory step, and difficulty scales by introducing more complex enemy types and boss mechanics that require mastery of each new combat system. Players lose if their character's HP (e.g., starting at 10, increasing to 100+) reaches zero, respawning at the last save point, and win by completing the final narrative arc.
game_info.description: Evoland is a retro adventure where your game world literally evolves as you play! Start in a primitive monochrome realm and unlock new features like color, scrolling camera, and enhanced combat by discovering evolution chests. Battle enemies, collect treasure, and progress through the story to transform your simple adventure into a full-featured RPG experience. Defeat the final boss to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character in 4 directions
Space: Attack enemies / Interact with chests
Z: Activate dodge roll (unlocked later)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and validates that the player can move in all four directions without getting stuck. Ensures collision detection works properly with walls and obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player character systematically through all four cardinal directions, testing boundary detection and collision systems. Navigate around obstacles and ensure smooth movement.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, collides properly with walls and obstacles, and maintains correct position tracking. No clipping through walls or getting stuck.

TEST_2.test_description: Implements the optimal win strategy by systematically collecting all evolution chests in order, defeating required enemies, and beating the final boss. This validates the complete game progression path.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to evolution chests in optimal order to unlock color, scrolling, and combat upgrades. Engage enemies strategically, collecting health drops when needed. Use dodge mechanics for boss fights and maintain optimal HP throughout progression.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully unlock all evolution features, defeat all required enemies including the final boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN condition. Game state shows victory and all major mechanics were tested.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics including attacking, taking damage, and health management. Validates that enemy AI responds correctly and combat interactions work as designed.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately engage with enemies at various evolution stages. Test attack timing, damage calculation, and enemy response patterns. Collect health drops and verify HP changes correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Combat system functions properly with accurate hit detection, damage application, and enemy behavior. Health system correctly tracks damage and healing. Player can defeat enemies consistently.
